sections.paragraph:
verb לבלוע

to swallow, gulp, devour, eat up; absorb

verb להיבלע

be swallowed, devoured, eaten up; absorbed

verb בולע

damaged, harmed; swallowed

verb להבליע

to make disappear, make swallow; syncopate

verb הובלע

be made to disappear; absorbed; syncopated

masculine noun

absorption; swallowing
